texto: I'm always writing something. There's always some structure sitting around someplace. There's always things on the computer, things scratched on score paper, legal tablets full of lyrics. It's never not buzzing around me all the time. I'm always doing it.
explicacao: Citação de J. D. Souther sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I'm always writing something. There's always some structure sitting around someplace. There's alw…” articula tempo, time, writing em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como writing e me.
